rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing type mismatches in guarantee expressions
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in declarations
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
